## Meeting Purpose

[Explore Udemy's content management, skills mapping, and trial processes to identify opportunities for AI-assisted improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Udemy's content management involves complex processes for curating courses into various collections, with opportunities to enhance skills-based organization and automation](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [The trial experience is being redesigned to better guide users to relevant, high-quality content aligned with skills](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [There's a need to build more confidence with L\&D leaders about Udemy's value proposition, especially regarding course freshness and instructor credibility](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Udemy's marketplace model and scale are key differentiators, but require effective storytelling to overcome potential objections](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2250.0)

## Topics

### Content Management and Curation

  - [Udemy Business (UB) catalog contains \~38,000 English courses, curated from 250,000 on Udemy.com](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Curation process involves minimum criteria (e.g., 4.35 rating for English courses) and collection-specific criteria](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Courses are added based on gaps identified by content strategy team and top instructor offerings](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Automated and manual processes for curating out underperforming courses (e.g., below 4.0 rating)](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Opportunity to improve scalable collection management and automate more processes](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)

### Skills Mapping and Organization

  - [Current course organization primarily based on categories, subcategories, and tags](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Desire to shift towards more skills-based organization and presentation](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Manual process for mapping courses to skills and creating skill frameworks (e.g., AI skills breakdown)](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [Opportunity to develop a more comprehensive skills graph to improve various processes and customer-facing features](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

### Trial Experience and Optimization

  - [Current trial experience being redesigned to guide users to relevant, high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Adding showcase paths and AI starter paths to highlight breadth and freshness of collection](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Monitoring leading indicators like user engagement and AE best practice completion](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2594.0)
  - [Opportunity to develop more marketing-driven tactics to improve trial performance](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2594.0)

### Data and Analytics

  - [Various dashboards and SQL queries used for collection management and analysis](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
  - [Opportunity to improve linkage between search queries and content availability](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Need for better tools to identify gaps in collection based on user searches and market trends](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Potential to leverage AI for more responsive content recommendations and gap identification](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### Marketing and Customer Education

  - [Blog, business.udemy.com, and other ungated content used to drive interest](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2900.0)
  - [Global Learning and Skills Report showcases trending topics and Udemy's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3406.0)
  - [Opportunity to improve storytelling around Udemy's marketplace model, scale, and instructor quality](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2250.0)
  - [Need to educate customers on the value of course freshness over high production quality](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Connect with Niamh to discuss learner recommendation processes](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3655.0)
  - [Explore potential for developing a comprehensive skills graph to support various use cases](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Investigate ways to leverage trending topic data and first-to-market advantages in marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3406.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meetings with Krista (marketing) and other relevant team members](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3678.0)
  - [Review additional materials shared (e.g., Global Learning and Skills Report) for further insights](https://fathom.video/share/Hyj7phzjsXzxxiDsW_ZcKwBbvSMzyseZ?tab=summary&timestamp=3429.0)
